body: I noticed that [`Fieldset.Legend`](https://github.com/mui/base-ui/blob/master/packages/react/src/fieldset/legend/FieldsetLegend.tsx) render a `div` instead of a `legend` by default, which seems a bit counterintuitive at first. What's the reason for that?
title: [fieldset] Why does `Fieldset.Legend` render a `div` instead of a `legend` by default?
